pipeline.title: 请求许可 · 中译英

items.zh: 我能借用你的手机吗？——当然可以。
items.answer: Can I use your phone? -- Yes of course.
Can I come in? -- Please come in.

items.zh: 能给我一张收据吗？——好的。
items.answer: Can I get a receipt please? -- Sure.

pipeline.title: 请求许可 · 英译中

items.en: Can I borrow your pen? -- Sure, here you are.
items.answer: 我能借你的笔吗？——当然，给你。

items.en: May I enter the room? -- Please do.
items.answer: 我可以进房间吗？——请进。

items.en: Could you check this form for me?
items.answer: 你能帮我检查一下这张表格吗？

pipeline.title: 请求许可 · 句型

items.answer: Can I use your phone? Yes of course.
Can I have a glass of water? Here you go.
items.pattern: Can I have ___? — Here you go.

items.answer: Is it okay if I sit here? -- Sure.

pipeline.title: 请求许可 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: Can I / May I / Is it okay

items.answer: Can I borrow your pen? -- Sure.
May I come in? -- Please do.

patterns.chunk: Is it okay if I ___? / Do you mind if I ___?

items.zh: 我坐这里可以吗？——没问题。
items.answer: Is it okay if I sit here? -- No problem.

items.zh: 你介意我开窗吗？——不介意。
items.answer: Do you mind if I open the window? -- Not at all.

pipeline.title: Can/Could 礼貌程度 · 中译英

items.zh: 您能告诉我去博物馆怎么走吗？
items.answer: Could you tell me how to get to the museum?
Could I have the bill please?
Could you help me please?

pipeline.title: Can/Could 礼貌程度 · 英译中

items.en: Would you mind opening the window?
items.answer: 你介意打开窗户吗？

items.en: Is it possible to change my reservation?
items.answer: 可以改我的预约吗？

items.en: Could you do me a favor?
items.answer: 你能帮我一个忙吗？

pipeline.title: Can/Could 礼貌程度 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: Could you tell me how to get to ___?
pipeline.patternMeaning: 您能告诉我去...怎么走吗？

items.zh: 您能告诉我去...怎么走吗？
items.answer: Could you tell me how to get to the museum?
items.pattern: Could you tell me how to get to ___?

items.answer: Could I have the bill please?
Could you speak more slowly please?

pipeline.title: Can/Could 礼貌程度 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: Could you / Would you / Is it possible

items.zh: 您能帮我看一下这个吗？
items.answer: Could you take a look at this please?
Would you pass me the salt please?

patterns.chunk: Is it possible to ___? / Is there any way to ___?

items.zh: 可以改一下预约时间吗？
items.answer: Is it possible to reschedule the appointment?
Is there any way to check in early?

pipeline.title: 能力程度表达 · 中译英

items.answer: I can speak a little French.
She can sing very well.
I can't swim.

pipeline.title: 能力程度表达 · 英译中

items.en: I can manage this task by myself.
items.answer: 我能自己处理这项任务。

items.en: She is capable of finishing it on time.
items.answer: 她有能力按时完成。

items.en: Can you handle this situation?
items.answer: 你能处理这种情况吗？

pipeline.title: 能力程度表达 · 句型

items.answer: I can't speak French.
She can sing very well.
Can you help me? Sure.
Can I use your phone? Yes of course.
Can I have a glass of water?
items.pattern: Can I have ___? — Here you go.

pipeline.title: 能力程度表达 · 一词多句

patterns.chunk: I can ___. / I am able to ___.

items.answer: I can order in Chinese.

items.zh: 他能在截止日期前完成。
items.answer: He is able to finish before the deadline.

patterns.chunk: I can't ___. / I am not good at ___.

items.answer: I can't cook Chinese food.
I am not good at remembering names.

pipeline.title: 承诺与保证 · 中译英

items.zh: 我保证你会喜欢这个的。
items.answer: I guarantee you'll love it.

items.zh: 我保证不会告诉任何人。
items.answer: I promise I won't tell anyone.
I swear I'm telling the truth.

pipeline.title: 承诺与保证 · 英译中

items.en: I assure you everything will be fine.
items.answer: 我向你保证一切都会好的。

items.en: I vow to always be by your side.
items.answer: 我发誓永远在你身边。

items.en: He pledged to support the project.
items.answer: 他承诺支持这个项目。

pipeline.title: 承诺与保证 · 句型

items.answer: I promise I'll be there on time.
I swear I won't tell anyone.

pipeline.title: 承诺与保证 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 简单承诺
levels.en: I promise I'll be there.
levels.zh: 我保证我会到。
levels.hint: 先做简单承诺

levels.label: 加强保证
levels.en: I promise I'll be there. I guarantee it.
levels.zh: 我保证我会到。我保证。
levels.hint: 加上 I guarantee it 加强语气

levels.label: 郑重发誓
levels.en: I promise I'll be there. I guarantee it. I swear on my word.
levels.zh: 我保证我会到。我保证。我以名誉发誓。
levels.hint: 用 I swear 做最郑重的承诺

pipeline.title: 意愿表达/社交祝愿 · 中译英

items.answer: I hope you have a wonderful day.
Good luck on your exam!
Best of luck to you!

pipeline.title: 意愿表达/社交祝愿 · 英译中

items.en: Let's celebrate your success tonight!
items.answer: 今晚庆祝你的成功吧！

items.en: Cheer up! Everything will be okay.
items.answer: 振作起来！一切都会好的。

items.en: I congratulate you on your achievement.
items.answer: 祝贺你取得的成就。

pipeline.title: 意愿表达/社交祝愿 · 句型

items.answer: Good luck on your test! You'll do great.
Have a great trip!
Happy birthday! I hope you have a wonderful day!
Congratulations on your new job!
I believe in you. You can do it!
items.pattern: I believe in you. You can ___!

pipeline.title: 意愿表达/社交祝愿 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 简单祝福
levels.en: Good luck on your test!
levels.zh: 祝你考试好运！
levels.hint: 先说 Good luck

levels.label: 表达愿望
levels.en: Good luck on your test! I hope you do well.
levels.zh: 祝你考试好运！希望你能考好。
levels.hint: 加上 I hope 表达愿望

levels.label: 完整祝福
levels.en: Good luck on your test! I hope you do well. Have a great day!
levels.zh: 祝你考试好运！希望你能考好。祝你有美好的一天！
levels.hint: 用 Have a great day 完整收尾

pipeline.title: 我打算… · 中译英

items.answer: I'm going to study abroad next year.
We plan to move next month.
I intend to learn a new language.

pipeline.title: 我打算… · 英译中

items.en: I have made all the arrangements for the trip.
items.answer: 我已经为旅行做好了所有安排。

items.en: I need to do more preparation for the exam.
items.answer: 我 need 为考试做更多准备。

items.en: My aim is to finish this project by Friday.
items.answer: 我的目标是在周五前完成这个项目。

pipeline.title: 我打算… · 句型
slots: move to a new city next month
start a new job next week

items.answer: I'm going to study abroad next year.

slotValues.slot2: move to a new city next month
slotValues.slot3: start a new job next week

items.answer: She's going to travel to Japan next summer.
Are you going to join us for dinner?

pipeline.title: 我打算… · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: going to / plan to / intend to

patterns.chunk: I'm going to ___. / I plan to ___.

items.answer: I'm going to study abroad next year.
I plan to move to a new city.

patterns.chunk: She's going to ___. / He intends to ___.

items.answer: She's going to travel to Japan.
He intends to learn a new language.

pipeline.title: 将会怎样 · 中译英

items.answer: I predict it will snow tomorrow.
The forecast says it will be sunny.
The future will be very different.

pipeline.title: 将会怎样 · 英译中

items.en: It is likely to rain this evening.
items.answer: 今晚很可能下雨。

items.en: The weather will remain warm for the next few days.
items.answer: 接下来几天天气会保持温暖。

items.en: He will probably arrive late due to traffic.
items.answer: 由于交通他可能会迟到。

pipeline.title: 将会怎样 · 句型

items.answer: It will rain tomorrow.
He will probably be late for the meeting.
I think everything will be okay in the end.

pipeline.title: 将会怎样 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 简单预测
levels.en: It will rain tomorrow.
levels.zh: 明天会下雨。
levels.hint: 用 will 做简单预测

levels.label: 加程度
levels.en: It will probably rain tomorrow.
levels.zh: 明天很可能会下雨。
levels.hint: 加上 probably 表示可能性

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: It will probably rain tomorrow because the sky is dark.
levels.zh: 明天很可能会下雨因为天黑了。
levels.hint: 加上 because 说明原因

pipeline.title: 将来时间表达 · 中译英

items.answer: I will be there soon.
We will discuss this later.
I will call you tonight.

pipeline.title: 将来时间表达 · 英译中

items.en: I will finish the report tomorrow.
items.answer: 我明天会完成报告。

items.en: We are moving to a new office next month.
items.answer: 我们下个月搬到新办公室。

items.en: This is just the beginning; the eventual outcome will be great.
items.answer: 这只是开始；最终结果会很棒的。

pipeline.title: 将来时间表达 · 句型

items.answer: I will be there soon.
I will finish the report tomorrow.
We will start the project next week.

pipeline.title: 将来时间表达 · 一词多句

items.answer: I will be there soon.
We will discuss this later.
We will start next week.
She will travel next month.

pipeline.title: 计划疑问句 · 中译英

items.answer: Let me ask about his plans.
I wonder if he will come.
Have you decided where to go?

pipeline.title: 计划疑问句 · 英译中

items.en: I'm still uncertain about my plans for the summer.
items.answer: 我还不能确定夏天的计划。

items.en: She's unsure whether to take the job.
items.answer: 她不确定是否接受这份工作。

items.en: I need to get a clear idea of what to do next.
items.answer: 我需要清楚接下来该做什么。

pipeline.title: 计划疑问句 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: What are you going to do ___?

items.answer: What are you going to do this weekend?
items.pattern: What are you going to do ___?

items.answer: Have you decided where to go for vacation?
I wonder if he will come to the party.

pipeline.title: 计划疑问句 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 简单提问
levels.en: What are you going to do this weekend?
levels.zh: 你这周末打算做什么？
levels.hint: 用 What are you going to do 提问

levels.label: 加选择
levels.en: What are you going to do this weekend? Stay home or go out?
levels.zh: 你这周末打算做什么？待在家还是出去？
levels.hint: 用 or 提供选项

levels.label: 加邀约
levels.en: What are you going to do this weekend? Would you like to join us?
levels.zh: 你这周末打算做什么？要不要加入我们？
levels.hint: 加上邀请

pipeline.title: 预测与迹象 · 中译英

items.answer: It's getting dark. It's going to rain.

items.zh: 有迹象表明经济在好转。
items.answer: There are signs that the economy is improving.
It's clear that he will succeed.

pipeline.title: 预测与迹象 · 英译中

items.en: It's apparent that she's going to win the race.
items.answer: 很明显她会赢得比赛。

items.en: The project is likely to be finished on time.
items.answer: 这个项目很可能会按时完成。

items.en: You are bound to pass the exam if you study hard.
items.answer: 如果你努力学习就一定会通过考试。

pipeline.title: 预测与迹象 · 句型
slots: rain because the sky is dark
storm because the wind is strong

items.answer: It's going to rain because the sky is dark.
He is bound to succeed if he keeps trying.
Look at the clouds! It's going to rain soon.

pipeline.title: 预测与迹象 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: going to / bound to / likely to

patterns.chunk: It's going to ___. / It's likely to ___.

items.answer: It's going to rain. The sky is dark.
It's likely to snow tonight.
He is bound to succeed.
She is bound to win the race.

pipeline.title: 我能/会… · 中译英

items.zh: 我有能力完成这项任务。
items.answer: I have the ability to finish this task.
Her communication skills are excellent.
He has a talent for music.

pipeline.title: 我能/会… · 英译中

items.answer: 我能流利地说三种语言。

items.en: This course will enable me to improve my English.
items.answer: 这门课将使我能够提高英语水平。

pipeline.title: 我能/会… · 句型

items.answer: I can speak English very well.
She can dance beautifully.
He can't speak French at all.

pipeline.title: 我能/会… · 一词多句

patterns.chunk: I can ___. / I am able to ___.

items.answer: I can speak three languages.
I am able to finish this task.
She is capable of handling difficult situations.
He is capable of solving this problem.

pipeline.title: 请求帮助 · 中译英

items.answer: Can you help me please?
I need your support.

items.zh: 你能协助我完成这个项目吗？
items.answer: Can you assist me with this project?

pipeline.title: 请求帮助 · 英译中

items.en: Could you do me a favor?
items.answer: 你能帮我个忙吗？

items.en: Could you lend me a hand with this?
items.answer: 你能帮我一把吗？

items.en: Can you give me a hand? I'm stuck.
items.answer: 你能帮我一下吗？我卡住了。

pipeline.title: 请求帮助 · 句型

items.answer: Could you help me carry this bag?
Could you do me a favor?
Would you mind helping me with this?

pipeline.title: 请求帮助 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 简单请求
levels.en: Can you help me?
levels.zh: 你能帮我吗？
levels.hint: 用 Can you 请求帮助

levels.label: 礼貌请求
levels.en: Could you help me carry this bag?
levels.zh: 你能帮我拿这个包吗？
levels.hint: 用 Could you 更礼貌

levels.label: 详细请求
levels.en: Could you please help me carry this heavy bag? I'd really appreciate it.
levels.zh: 你能帮我拿这个重包吗？非常感谢。
levels.hint: 加上 I'd appreciate it 表达感谢

pipeline.title: 你应该/必须 · 中译英

items.answer: You should see a doctor.
You must be there by 8 o'clock.

items.zh: 你应该为自己的行为负责。
items.answer: You ought to be responsible for your actions.

pipeline.title: 你应该/必须 · 英译中

items.en: I recommend you take a taxi.
items.answer: 我建议你打车。

items.en: I suggest you talk to your teacher.
items.answer: 我建议你找老师谈谈。

items.en: I advise you to start early.
items.answer: 我建议你早点开始。

pipeline.title: 你应该/必须 · 句型
slots: see a doctor it gets worse

items.answer: You should see a doctor before it gets worse.

slotValues.slot1: see a doctor it gets worse

items.answer: He must finish the report by Friday.
You shouldn't eat so much junk food.

pipeline.title: 你应该/必须 · 一词多句

items.answer: You should see a doctor.
You must be there by 8 o'clock.

patterns.chunk: You shouldn't ___. / You don't have to ___.

items.answer: You shouldn't stay up late.
You don't have to pay now.

pipeline.title: 客观义务 have to · 中译英

items.answer: I have to work tomorrow.
He was forced to accept the decision.

items.zh: 按要求所有人都要参加。
items.answer: Everyone is required to attend.

pipeline.title: 客观义务 have to · 英译中

items.en: I am obliged to follow the rules.
items.answer: 我有义务遵守规则。

items.en: Wearing a seatbelt is mandatory.
items.answer: 系安全带是强制性的。

items.en: English is compulsory in this school.
items.answer: 英语在这所学校是必修课。

pipeline.title: 客观义务 have to · 句型

items.answer: I have to work every day this week.
She has to take a taxi because she's late.

slotValues.slot3: study hard the exam is coming

items.answer: Do I have to bring my passport?

pipeline.title: 客观义务 have to · 逐步构建

levels.label: 简单义务
levels.en: I have to work today.
levels.zh: 我今天必须上班。
levels.hint: 用 have to 表达客观义务

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: I have to work today because my boss asked me.
levels.zh: 我今天必须上班因为老板让我去。
levels.hint: 加上 because 说明原因

levels.label: 加频率
levels.en: I have to work every day this week because we have a deadline.
levels.zh: 我这周每天都得上班因为我们有截止日期。
levels.hint: 加上频率表达

pipeline.title: 禁止与不必 · 中译英

items.answer: You mustn't smoke here.
Parking is banned in this area.
Access is restricted.

items.en: Attendance is optional, not required.
items.answer: 出席是可选的，不是必须的。

items.en: It's unnecessary to bring anything.
items.answer: 不必带任何东西。

items.en: You don't need a permit for this.
items.answer: 这个不需要许可证。

pipeline.title: 禁止与不必 · 句型

items.answer: You mustn't smoke here.
You don't have to pay now. You can pay later.
items.pattern: You don't have to ___ now. You can ___ later.

items.answer: Smoking is not allowed in this building.

pipeline.title: 禁止与不必 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: mustn't / don't have to / not allowed

patterns.chunk: You mustn't ___. / You are not allowed to ___.

items.answer: You mustn't smoke here.
You are not allowed to park here.

patterns.chunk: You don't have to ___. / It's optional.

items.answer: You don't have to pay now.
It's optional to attend.

items.en: What's your opinion on this matter?

items.answer: 你知道我应该怎么做吗？

items.pattern: What should I ___? I can't decide.

items.answer: What do you think about taking a taxi?

pipeline.vocabWord: What should / What do you suggest / What's your opinion

items.answer: What should I do?
What should I wear?
What do you think about taking a taxi?

items.zh: 你觉得那家新餐厅怎么样？
items.answer: What do you think about the new restaurant?

pipeline.title: 推荐表达 · 中译英

items.answer: I recommend this restaurant.
I suggest trying this app.
I propose we order the set menu.

pipeline.title: 推荐表达 · 英译中

items.en: This dish is very popular among customers.
items.answer: 这道菜很受顾客欢迎。

items.en: The service here is excellent.
items.answer: 这里的服务非常好。

items.en: This movie is definitely worth watching.
items.answer: 这部电影绝对值得一看。

pipeline.title: 推荐表达 · 句型
slots: this restaurant the food is great

items.answer: I recommend this restaurant because the food is great.

slotValues.slot1: this restaurant the food is great

slotValues.slot1: this new cafe the coffee is excellent

items.answer: I highly recommend visiting the museum.

pipeline.title: 推荐表达 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 简单推荐
levels.en: I recommend this restaurant.
levels.zh: 我推荐这家餐厅。
levels.hint: 用 I recommend 推荐

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: I recommend this restaurant because the food is excellent.
levels.zh: 我推荐这家餐厅因为食物很好。
levels.hint: 加上 because 说明原因

levels.label: 加行动建议
levels.en: I recommend this restaurant because the food is excellent. You should try the pasta!
levels.zh: 我推荐这家餐厅因为食物很好。你应该试试他们家的意面！
levels.hint: 加上 You should try 的具体建议

pipeline.title: 可能 may/might · 中译英

items.answer: He may be late.
Maybe she is telling the truth.
Perhaps we should wait a bit more.

pipeline.title: 可能 may/might · 英译中

items.en: It's likely to rain later today.
items.answer: 今天晚些时候很可能下雨。

items.en: The outcome is still uncertain.
items.answer: 结果还不确定。

items.en: It's doubtful that she will come now.
items.answer: 她现在来的可能性很小。

pipeline.title: 可能 may/might · 句型

items.answer: It may rain this evening.

items.pattern: She might ___ but I'm not sure.

items.answer: There may be traffic on the way.

pipeline.title: 可能 may/might · 一词多句

items.answer: It may rain this evening.
She might come to the party.
Maybe she is telling the truth.
Perhaps we should wait.

pipeline.title: 邀请与提议 · 中译英

items.zh: 他给了我很优惠的条件。
items.answer: He offered me a very good deal.

pipeline.title: 邀请与提议 · 英译中

items.answer: 很高兴你能来。

items.answer: Would you like to join us for dinner?
I'd be happy to help you with your project.
Let me suggest we try that new restaurant.

pipeline.title: 邀请与提议 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 简单邀请
levels.en: Would you like to join us?
levels.zh: 你想加入我们吗？
levels.hint: 用 Would you like 发出邀请

levels.label: 说明活动
levels.en: Would you like to join us for dinner tonight?
levels.zh: 今晚想和我们一起吃晚饭吗？
levels.hint: 说明具体活动和时间

levels.label: 热情邀请
levels.en: Would you like to join us for dinner tonight? We'd love to have you!
levels.zh: 今晚想和我们一起吃晚饭吗？我们很希望你来！
levels.hint: 用 We'd love to have you 表达热情

pipeline.title: 主动提供 Shall I/Let me · 中译英

items.answer: Shall I carry your bag for you?
Let me help you.
He volunteered to help organize the event.

pipeline.title: 主动提供 Shall I/Let me · 英译中

items.en: Do you need any assistance?
items.answer: 你需要任何帮助吗？

items.en: I'm here to offer my support.
items.answer: 我在这里为你提供支持。

items.en: Our service includes free delivery.
items.answer: 我们的服务包括免费送货。

pipeline.title: 主动提供 Shall I/Let me · 句型

items.answer: Shall I open the door for you?
Let me help you with that.
Let me check the schedule for you.

pipeline.title: 主动提供 Shall I/Let me · 一词多句

items.answer: Shall I open the door for you?
Shall I call a taxi?
Let me help you with that.
Let me check the schedule for you.

pipeline.title: 委婉提议 How about · 中译英

items.answer: How about going for a walk?
I propose we meet another time.
What do you recommend doing?

pipeline.title: 委婉提议 How about · 英译中

items.en: We need to find an alternative solution.
items.answer: 我们需要找到替代方案。

items.en: This option seems better.
items.answer: 这个选择似乎更好。

items.en: It's your choice. What do you prefer?
items.answer: 这是你的选择。你更喜欢哪个？

pipeline.title: 委婉提议 How about · 句型

items.answer: How about going for a walk?
Why don't we take a break and have some coffee?

slotValues.slot1: take a break have some coffee

items.answer: What do you think about taking the train instead?
items.pattern: What do you think about ___ instead?

pipeline.title: 委婉提议 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 委婉提议
levels.en: How about going for a walk?
levels.zh: 出去走走怎么样？
levels.hint: 用 How about 提出建议

levels.label: 加理由
levels.en: How about going for a walk? The weather is nice.
levels.zh: 出去走走怎么样？天气很好。
levels.hint: 加上理由让对方更容易接受

levels.label: 加肯定期待
levels.en: How about going for a walk? The weather is nice. I think you'd love it!
levels.zh: 出去走走怎么样？天气很好。我觉得你会喜欢的！
levels.hint: 用 I think you'd love it 表达自信

pipeline.title: 礼貌接受与拒绝 · 中译英

items.answer: I'd be happy to accept the invitation.
I have to decline politely.
He refused my request.

pipeline.title: 礼貌接受与拒绝 · 英译中

items.en: I'm very grateful for your kind offer.
items.answer: 我非常感谢你的好意。

items.en: I really appreciate your help.
items.answer: 我非常感谢你的帮助。

items.en: I'm delighted to join you.
items.answer: 我很高兴加入你们。

pipeline.title: 礼貌接受与拒绝 · 句型

items.answer: I'd love to join you.
Thanks for the invitation but I'm afraid I can't make it.

slotValues.slot1: I'm afraid I can't make it
slotValues.slot3: I need to check my schedule

items.answer: Thank you anyway. Maybe next time!

pipeline.title: 礼貌接受与拒绝 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: I'd love to / Thanks but / Maybe next time
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 我很乐意/谢谢但/下次吧

patterns.chunk: I'd love to ___. / That sounds great!

items.answer: I'd love to join you.
That sounds great!
Thanks for the invitation but I'm afraid I can't make it.
Thank you anyway. Maybe next time!

pipeline.title: 祝福用语 · 中译英

items.answer: God bless you.
Good luck!
Congratulations on your graduation!

pipeline.title: 祝福用语 · 英译中

items.en: Let's celebrate your achievement tonight!
items.answer: 今晚来庆祝你的成就吧！

items.en: I'd like to propose a toast to the happy couple!
items.answer: 我想为幸福的一对敬一杯！

items.en: Best wishes for your new journey!
items.answer: 祝你的新旅程一切顺利！

pipeline.title: 祝福用语 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I wish you all the best with ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我祝你在...方面一切顺利。

items.zh: 我祝你在...方面一切顺利。
items.answer: I wish you all the best with your new job.
items.pattern: I wish you all the best with ___.

items.answer: Have a wonderful day!
Happy New Year! I wish you happiness!

pipeline.title: 祝福用语 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 简单祝福
levels.en: Good luck on your test!
levels.zh: 祝你考试好运！
levels.hint: 先说 Good luck

levels.label: 加愿望
levels.en: Good luck on your test! I hope you do well.
levels.zh: 祝你考试好运！希望你能考好。
levels.hint: 加上 I hope 表达愿望

levels.label: 完整祝福
levels.en: Good luck on your test! I hope you do well. I believe in you!
levels.zh: 祝你考试好运！希望你能考好。我相信你！
levels.hint: 用 I believe in you 鼓励对方

pipeline.title: 鼓励与支持 · 中译英

items.answer: I encourage you to keep trying.
We support your decision.
His story motivated me.

pipeline.title: 鼓励与支持 · 英译中

items.en: Keep going! Don't give up!
items.answer: 继续加油！别放弃！

items.en: I believe in you. You can make it!
items.answer: 我相信你。你能行的！

items.en: Cheer up! Things will get better.
items.answer: 振作起来！一切都会好的。

pipeline.title: 鼓励与支持 · 句型

items.answer: I believe you can make it.
Keep going! You're almost there!
Don't give up! You can do this!

pipeline.title: 鼓励与支持 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: I believe / Keep going / Don't give up

patterns.chunk: I believe in you. You can ___.

items.answer: I believe in you. You can make it!
I believe you can pass the exam.
Keep going! Don't give up!
Keep trying! Don't stop!

pipeline.title: 提供帮助 · 中译英

items.answer: I'd be happy to help you.

items.zh: 如果你需要任何帮助请告诉我。
items.answer: Let me know if you need any assistance.
I'll always be here to support you.

pipeline.title: 提供帮助 · 英译中

items.en: I'm willing to help with anything you need.
items.answer: 我愿意帮你做任何事。

items.en: I'm ready to assist whenever you need me.
items.answer: 我随时准备好帮助你。

items.en: I'm available if you need a hand.
items.answer: 如果你需要帮忙，我有空。

pipeline.title: 提供帮助 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I'd be happy to ___ for you.

items.answer: I'd be happy to help you.
items.pattern: I'd be happy to ___ for you.

items.answer: Let me know if you need any assistance.
items.pattern: Let me know if you need ___ ___.

items.answer: Do you need me to pick you up?

pipeline.title: 提供帮助 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 简单提供
levels.en: I'd be happy to help you.
levels.zh: 我很乐意帮你。
levels.hint: 用 I'd be happy to help 主动提供

levels.label: 加具体帮助
levels.en: I'd be happy to help you with your project.
levels.zh: 我很乐意帮你做项目。
levels.hint: 加上具体帮什么

levels.label: 加邀请
levels.en: I'd be happy to help you with your project. Let me know if you need anything!
levels.zh: 我很乐意帮你做项目。如果你需要什么，告诉我！
levels.hint: 用 Let me know 保持开放
